all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And Moses said unto him, As soon as I am gone out of the city, I will spread abroad my hands unto the Lord; and the thunder shall cease, neither shall there be any more hail; that thou mayest know how that the earth is the Lord’s.
Exodus 9:29
Quote of the Day
"Reconciliation … heals relationships, softens hearts, and strengthens our discipleship, bringing increased confidence before God."
Elder Kelly R. Johnson | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
